framework.name: Government Cloud Doctrine (Cloud de confiance)
framework.name_nl: Doctrine d'utilisation du cloud par l'Etat (Cloud de confiance)
framework.scope: Cloud usage doctrine for French government administrations defining "Cloud au centre" strategy
framework.structure_description: Principles covering cloud-first strategy, data sensitivity classification, SecNumCloud requirement for sensitive data, sovereign cloud requirements, and permitted cloud providers.

controls.title: Cloud-first principle
controls.description: Government administrations shall adopt a "Cloud au centre" approach for all new projects and digital services.
controls.description_nl: Les administrations publiques doivent adopter une approche « Cloud au centre » pour tous les nouveaux projets et services numeriques.

controls.title: Data sensitivity classification for cloud
controls.title_nl: Classification de la sensibilite des donnees pour le cloud
controls.description: Classify data into sensitivity levels: public, ordinary, sensitive, very sensitive. Cloud choice depends on classification.
controls.description_nl: Classifier les donnees en niveaux de sensibilite : publiques, ordinaires, sensibles, tres sensibles. Le choix du cloud depend de la classification.

controls.title: SecNumCloud for sensitive data
controls.description: Sensitive and very sensitive government data shall only be hosted on SecNumCloud-qualified cloud providers.
controls.description_nl: Les donnees gouvernementales sensibles et tres sensibles ne doivent etre hebergees que chez des fournisseurs cloud qualifies SecNumCloud.

controls.title: EU data sovereignty
controls.description: Government data shall be stored and processed within the European Union, by EU-controlled entities.
controls.description_nl: Les donnees gouvernementales doivent etre stockees et traitees au sein de l'Union europeenne, par des entites controlees par l'UE.

controls.title: Protection from non-EU jurisdictions
controls.description: Cloud providers hosting government data shall not be subject to non-EU extraterritorial legislation (e.g., CLOUD Act, FISA).
controls.description_nl: Les fournisseurs cloud hebergeant des donnees gouvernementales ne doivent pas etre soumis a des legislations extraterritoriales non-UE (ex : CLOUD Act, FISA).

controls.title: Interministerial cloud catalog
controls.description: Use services from the interministerial cloud catalog (Pi Cloud) for government cloud deployments.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser les services du catalogue cloud interministeriel (Pi Cloud) pour les deploiements cloud gouvernementaux.

controls.title: Reversibility requirement
controls.description: All government cloud contracts shall include reversibility provisions ensuring data and service portability.
controls.description_nl: Tous les contrats cloud gouvernementaux doivent inclure des provisions de reversibilite assurant la portabilite des donnees et des services.

controls.title: Multi-cloud architecture
controls.description: Government cloud architectures should avoid single-provider lock-in through multi-cloud or hybrid strategies.
controls.description_nl: Les architectures cloud gouvernementales doivent eviter le verrouillage mono-fournisseur par des strategies multi-cloud ou hybrides.

controls.title: Cloud security baseline
controls.description: Cloud deployments shall implement a security baseline aligned with ANSSI SecNumCloud requirements and RGS.
controls.description_nl: Les deploiements cloud doivent implementer un socle de securite aligne sur les exigences SecNumCloud de l'ANSSI et le RGS.
